shades purchases of $100 or more; extra 25% off select purchases under $100. $10 off select apparel, shoes, accessories, fine and fashion jewelry, salon products, home, electrics/electronics, furniture, mattresses, custom blinds and shades purchases of $25 or more. Extra 15% off select watch purchases. Extra 10% off select major appliances. Each offer good at jcp.com only, excluding taxes and shipping charges, 12/1/16-12/6/16. IN STORE: Extra 25% off select apparel, shoes, accessories, fine and fashion jewelry, salon products, home, furniture, mattresses, custom blinds and shades purchases OR $10 off select purchases of $25 or more. Extra 15% off select watches and electrics/electronics purchases. Extra 10% off select major appliances. Each offer good in store only, excluding taxes and shipping charges, 12/1/16-12/6/16. One use per coupon, one coupon per customer per transaction; must be provided/surrendered at time of purchase. Does not apply to Nike, Levi's, Columbia, Disney Collection, Disney Tsum Tsum, Licensed Team Sports Merchandise, Athletic Shoes, Clarks, Modern Bride Diamond Vault, Jewelry Trunk Shows, Sephora in store and Sephora.com, Penney Lane, Hunter Douglas, Installed Flooring, Baby Gear, Gift Cards, Furniture Outlet purchases, Services, Service Plans, current orders and prior purchases, or in combination with other coupon(s). Coupon can be combined with earned JCPenney Rewards and JCPenney Credit Card new account in-store discount. Coupon cannot be used for payment on account. Coupon cannot be redeemed as cash or merchandise credit if merchandise is returned. $ off savings applied to all qualifying items on prorated basis; any refunds will be given in the prorated amount. No cash value. JCPenney may refuse, or limit the use of, any coupon and/or return for any reason, including reoccurring disruptive behavior. REPRODUCTIONS WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED. INSTRUCTIONS FOR JCP.COM ORDERS: $ off and extra % off offers cannot be applied on the same order. For $10 off $25, enter the online code 44SAVING when prompted at checkout. For extra % off, enter the online code 44BUYNOW when prompted at checkout.
